styleProfile.summary: Analyzed 51 ARV reference thumbnails: predominantly dark, high-contrast, dominant compositions dark-background, center-heavy, title-band. Average brightness 0.21, contrast 0.82. Recurring motifs: signal / transmission.
typographyNotes: clean lower third reserved for footer
negativeStyleRules: no readable AI-generated text in the background
no celebrity likeness or copyrighted characters

foundryIqMemory.query: Welche kuratierten ARV-Style-Regeln, Paletten und Titelmuster gelten fuer ein YouTube-Livestream-Thumbnail von Audioreworkvisions / Techno Transmissions? Welche Negative Rules und verbotenen Stilbrueche muessen fuer ein Techno-Thumbnail beachtet werden? Welche Prompt-DNA-Fragmente und Layout-Muster passen zu einem 16:9 Techno-Thumbnail mit lokal gerendertem Titeltext?
styleRules: Dark uncluttered backgrounds with dominant central subject; first-frame readability.
Title-band overlays: PEACE LOVE TECHNO (slogan, lower-third), TECHNO TRANSMISSIONS (topline), local render for main text.
Analog textures: damaged photocopy, toner dust, CRT bleed, scanned paper grain.
ARV palette: black, deep blue, red, amber, grey, magenta, off-white, green.
patterns: Signal transmission, ritual, archive, and frequency motifs.
Central silhouette, scanner band or halo, minimal artifact overlays.
Xerox ritual stillframe grammar: scanlines, chromatic misregistration, one clear visual event.
Dark sci-fi cartoon-graffiti fusion: hooded figure, cosmic mural, rim light, sprayed wall accents.
dramaturgy: ‘Formgebung aus dem Nichts’: central figure emerges through scanlines/chromatic edges.
‘Signal findet Lock’: visual payoff is the signal or frequency locking for one moment.
Treat title/text as ritual overlay – not branding clutter; only local render, no old thumbnail copying.
Prompt DNA: 'A black electro-boogie silhouette appears like a damaged photocopy on black paper. A hooded transmission monk sits in front of a red-cyan signal halo.'
continuity: Use ARV Thumbnail Studio logic: one dominant mechanism per scene, preserve ARV identity.
Do not copy previous thumbnails – each scene must anchor one new visual motif.
Palette, composition, and motif continuity must echo reference DNA: dark, center-heavy, ritualistic.
forbidden: No strobe lights, rapid blinking, harsh flashing, hectic pacing, violent flicker.
No generic corporate motion graphics, over-clean 3D polish, sterile stock-video realism.
No generic neon cyberpunk city, bland fantasy or ad polish.
No prominent text overlays except explicit thumbnail typography.

citations.excerpt: Image should not feel like generic AI fantasy/cyberpunk/corporate, but a discovered signal from underground broadcast... Must keep: hypnotic nocturne loop language, dark space, dominant mechanism, analog texture, strong readability... PEACE LOVE TECHNO; TECHNO TRANSMISSIONS.
Absolute avoid: strobe lights, rapid blinking, harsh flashing, hectic pacing, crowded club, chaotic glitch spam... Composition avoid: cluttered backgrounds, busy HUDs, loss of subject silhouette.
Primary palette families: velvet black, deep-blue, cyan halo, magenta edge bleed, red glow, dirty white... Material cues: damaged photocopy, toner dust, CRT scan, sprayed wall texture, analog grain.

Opening fragments: black electro-boogie silhouette, hooded transmission monk, signal halo, artifact overlays... Negative prompt: avoid prominent text overlays, watermarks, aggressive flashing, glossy ad polish.
Core loop: darkness -> reveal -> micro movement -> artifact -> controlled collapse -> hard freeze... Safety: no strobe, no rapid blinking, no hectic pacing...

concept.description: Raw Funky Techno with cosmic rave pressure, analog Xerox visuals and dark broadcast energy. Audioreworkvisions transmits an Agents League demo session where machine funk, signal flow and system rituals collide on the dancefloor. Underground rhythm, resistant groove and frequency-driven movement from body to circuit. PEACE LOVE TECHNO
concept.layout: Final composed thumbnail; centered brutal typography over a dark analog background, topline TECHNO TRANSMISSIONS above, PEACE LOVE TECHNO footer, center-heavy.

creativeDecision.whyTitle: The user-provided title "AGENTS LEAGUE SIGNAL HACK" was kept and normalized to uppercase ARV style.
creativeDecision.whyTheme: Theme "COSMIC FUNK TECHNO TRANSMISSION — AGENTS, SYSTEMS AND RITUAL CODE IN COLLISION" fits the Funky Techno vibe and the rave/cosmic mood.
creativeDecision.whyLayout: Layout: Final composed thumbnail; centered brutal typography over a dark analog background, topline TECHNO TRANSMISSIONS above, PEACE LOVE TECHNO footer, center-heavy.
creativeDecision.whyPalette: Palette red, black, deep-blue, amber, grey, magenta was derived from the analyzed ARV reference profile and Foundry IQ palette guidance.
creativeDecision.whyLocalText: The exact title is rendered locally via Sharp + SVG because AI image generators frequently misspell text; the background only provides scene and posterspace.
